name: youtube-triage
title: YouTube Triage
description: Process pending YouTube sources in the LLM Wiki vault.
author: rami

commands.name: process-pending
commands.title: Process Pending YouTube Videos
commands.description: Run the vault's pending YouTube triage workflow.

preferences.name: vaultPath
preferences.title: Vault Path
preferences.description: Absolute path to the knowledge-base vault.

preferences.name: provider
preferences.title: Triage Provider
preferences.description: AI provider passed to scripts/wiki_tool.py youtube-triage.

preferences.name: limit
preferences.title: Limit
preferences.description: Maximum pending videos to process in one run.

preferences.name: timeout
preferences.title: Timeout Seconds
preferences.description: Provider timeout in seconds for each triage call.

preferences.name: settleSeconds
preferences.title: Settle Seconds
preferences.description: Seconds to wait after pending files are found before processing.

preferences.name: maxBodyChars
preferences.title: Max Body Characters
preferences.description: Optional cap for source body characters sent to the provider.

preferences.name: dryRun
preferences.title: Dry Run
preferences.description: Print provider results without editing source files.
preferences.label: Do not edit files

preferences.name: noBuild
preferences.title: Skip Rebuild
preferences.description: Skip catalog/source manifest rebuild after updates.
preferences.label: Do not rebuild after triage
